content: Remote OK Junior Crypto Trader ATOM PARTNERS LIMITED <p>ATOM Partners is an international company focused on digital asset markets, trading technologies, and data-driven market research. We work with modern analytical tools and help aspiring professionals build practical knowledge of cryptocurrency trading in a structured environment.</p><p>We are currently looking for a Junior Crypto Trader to join our growing remote team. This opportunity is designed for motivated individuals who are interested in financial markets, cryptocurrency, and analytical thinking. Previous professional trading experience is not required â we provide comprehensive training and continuous guidance throughout the onboarding process.</p><p><strong>What You'll Do</strong><br /></p><ul><li>Execute trades according to established trading strategies and internal guidelines.</li><li>Monitor cryptocurrency markets and identify potential trading opportunities.</li><li>Analyze charts, technical indicators, and market trends.</li><li>Follow market news and evaluate its potential impact on digital assets.</li><li>Maintain trading discipline and apply risk management principles.</li><li>Record and review your trading performance.</li><li>Use professional trading software and market analysis tools.</li><li>Continuously improve your market knowledge and trading skills.<br /><strong><br /></strong></li></ul><p><strong>What We're Looking For</strong><br /></p><ul><li>Interest in cryptocurrency, trading, or financial markets.</li><li>Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.</li><li>Ability to stay focused and make decisions in a fast-paced environment.</li><li>Willingness to learn and develop professionally.</li><li>Good written and spoken English.<br /><strong><br /></strong></li></ul><p><strong>What We Offer</strong><br /></p><ul><li>Fully remote position with flexible working hours.</li><li>Comprehensive onboarding program provided by the company.</li><li>Hands-on experience with professional trading platforms.</li><li>Access to market analytics, educational resources, and trading tools.</li><li>Ongoing mentorship from experienced market professionals.</li><li>Clear development path with opportunities for increased responsibility.</li><li>Performance-based compensation.<br /><strong></strong></li></ul><p><strong>Benefits</strong><br /></p><ul><li>Remote work from anywhere.</li><li>Flexible schedule.</li><li>Structured training program.</li><li>Career development opportunities.</li><li>Continuous mentorship.</li><li>International team.</li><li>Modern analytical tools.<strong><br /></strong></li></ul><p><strong>Recruitment Process</strong><br /></p><ul><li>Step 1: Initial phone conversation with one of our recruiters.</li><li>Step 2: Online interview to discuss your background, motivation, and career goals.</li><li>Step 3: Introductory training session with https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Events &amp; Experiences Coordinator BlinkRx <p><strong>Company Overview:<br><br></strong>Blink Health is the fastest growing healthcare technology company that builds products to make prescriptions accessible and affordable to everybody.Â Our two primary products â BlinkRx and Quick Save â remove traditional roadblocks within the current prescription supply chain, resulting in better access to critical medications and improved health outcomes for patients.Â <br><br>BlinkRx is the worldâs first pharma-to-patient cloud that offers a digital concierge service for patients who are prescribed branded medications. Patients benefit from transparent low prices, free home delivery, and world-class support on this first-of-its-kind centralized platform. With BlinkRx, never again will a patient show up at the pharmacy only to discover that they canât afford their medication, their doctor needs to fill out a form for them, or the pharmacy doesnât have the medication in stock.Â <br><br>We are a highly collaborative team of builders and operators who invent new ways of working in an industry that historically has resisted innovation. Join us!</p> <p><strong>The Role</strong></p><p>We're looking for an Events &amp; Experiences Coordinator to support the execution of BlinkRx's portfolio of biopharma trade shows, provider conferences, and BlinkRx-hosted executive programs. This role works directly with our Senior Events &amp; Experiences Manager and is the operational backbone of every event we run â coordinating on-site logistics, attendee and travel coordination, and the pre- and post-event execution that makes each moment land.</p><p>The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, and energized by the fast-moving reality of live events. You're the person who shows up prepared, manages the details so others don't have to, and keeps things running smoothly when plans change on the ground.</p><p>This role can be remote with a preference for the Eastern or Central time zone, and requires approximately 20 to 30% travel for on-site event execution, including occasional evenings and weekends.</p><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><p>Event Execution and On-Site Support</p><ul><li>Serve as on-site logistics lead at BlinkRx's priority events, including biopharma trade shows (Asembia, JPM Healthcare), provider conferences (Vision Expo), and BlinkRx-hosted executive programs</li><li>Manage day-of coordination across staffing, booth setup, AV, signage, and attendee flow to ensure smooth execution</li><li>Act as the primary point of contact for vendors and venue teams during events, troubleshooting in real time</li></ul><p>Travel and Attendee Logistics</p><ul><li>Coordinate hotel blocks, room assignments, and attendee travel arrangements for BlinkRx staff attending major conferences</li><li>Manage rooming lists and reservations, with attention to last-minute changes and competing priorities</li><li>Build and maintain logistics trackers, run-of-show documents, and attendee briefings ahead of each event</li></ul><p>Pre-Event Planning Support</p><ul><li>Support the Senior Manager on venue sourcing, vendor outreach, and materials production timelines</li><li>Track project milestones and flag risks to keep deliverables on schedule</li><li>Assist with booth design coordination, swag and collateral ordering, and shipping logistics</li><li>Maintain organized documentation across events: contracts, vendor contacts, shipping records, and post-event notes</li></ul><p>Post-Event Operations</p><ul><li>Conduct post-event inventory and materials returns</li><li>Compile attendance, spend, and logistics notes to support the Senior Manager's post-event analysis</li><li>Identify recurring pain points and suggest process im
